overview.minides: Mahindra's first Born Electric Coupe SUV — INGLO platform, 656 km ARAI range (79kWh), triple 12.3-inch screens, 175 kW DC fast charge, Level 2 ADAS. Launched November 2024.
overview.description: Launched on 26 November 2024, the Mahindra XEV 9e is Mahindra's first Born Electric coupe SUV built on the INGLO platform. Available in 5 variants across two battery packs — 59 kWh (228 hp, 542 km ARAI) and 79 kWh (282 hp, 656 km ARAI) — all RWD. The XEV 9e sits above the BE 6 in Mahindra's INGLO lineup, distinguished by its larger dimensions (4789 mm), fastback coupe roofline, triple 12.3-inch coast-to-coast screen setup, a 150-litre frunk, and a 680 L boot. Pack Two onwards adds Harman Kardon 16-speaker Dolby Atmos, ventilated front seats, and alloy wheels. Pack Three adds Level 2 ADAS, powered co-driver seat, boss mode, rear seat ventilation, and 7 airbags. 175 kW DC fast charging provides 20-80% in 20 minutes on the 79 kWh pack. The Cineluxe Edition (₹29.35L, launched March 2026) adds matte paint options and exclusive styling. Wireless Android Auto/Apple CarPlay added via OTA in May 2025.

variants.name: Pack Two (79 kWh)
keyFeatures: 175 kW DC Fast Charge (20-80% in 20 min)

variants.name: Pack Three (79 kWh)
keyFeatures: 282 hp + 656 km ARAI Range | Level 2 ADAS
